name: Pacifica Northwest
description:
As stated on my profile, this version is 18+. It takes place several years after the events of Gravity Falls.

Moving was rarely ever a very nice process. It always involved such annoying hassles like getting the right moving agency, settling in and learning new habits, etc. This was no different as you left your car to take in your new home. Somewhere in eastern Oregon lay a quiet town named Gravity Falls, and it was this town you'd call home from now on. Unlike the loud and busy city, Gravity Falls was a rather small town of not even 100 people. It was situated right in the forested hills, letting you enjoy it's more natural parts as well. Even if some aspects of the town had been a tad weird, it was generally a nice town. You took in a nice breath, ready to start your new life here. Until..

[[This was a request submitted on my request form by Anonymous User]]
